summary: Comprehensive UI testing of Performance Tracker page redesign. All features working correctly with glass-morphism styling, gradient backgrounds, and proper functionality. Page loads at /performance, data generation works with Plan/Resource/Month selection, all 7 summary tiles render with gradient styling, revenue overrides work, pipeline rows are clickable and navigate to /leads?status=<status>, support badges toggle correctly, comparison table editing works, and Save Draft/Submit buttons function properly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing H2 2026 Sales Target plan with Rajesh Kumar (Bengaluru) resource
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracker UI redesign fully verified. All glass-morphism styling, gradient backgrounds, and interactive features working correctly.

Page_Load.details: Page loads at /performance with data-testid='performance-tracker', gradient icon in header, glass-morphism card styling

Selector_Dropdowns.details: Target Plan, Sales Resource, Month, Year dropdowns work correctly. Resources load after plan selection.

Generate_Button.details: Generate button with gradient styling (indigo-violet) triggers data fetch and displays all metrics

Summary_Tiles_Row.details: 7 tiles (Target, Revenue, Existing A/C, New A/C, Pipeline, Outstanding, Activities) render in 7-col grid with gradient backgrounds, icons, and proper values

Revenue_Metrics_Section.details: Shows Monthly Target, Achievement %, and 3 overridable rows (Revenue Lifetime, Revenue This Month, Revenue from New Accounts) with edit pencil, input field, save/reset buttons

Revenue_Override.details: Clicking edit shows input field, entering value and saving shows amber indicator dot and reset button

Account_Metrics_Section.details: Shows Existing Accounts (Lifetime) and New Accounts Onboarded This Month tiles with expand/collapse for lists > 3 items

Pipeline_Metrics_Section.details: Table with Status, No of Leads, Pipeline Value columns. Qualified row visible with clickable navigation

Collections_Outstanding_Section.details: Shows Total Outstanding, Outstanding Ratio, and 4 aging buckets (0-30D, 31-60D, 61-90D, 90+D) with color-coded styling

Activity_Metrics_Section.details: Two subsections: Total Activities (Messages, Calls, Customer Visits, Emails) and Unique Customers Reached (Unique Visits, Messages, Calls, Emails)

Support_Needed_Section.details: 6 toggleable badges (Pricing, Logistics, Marketing, Collections, Management Intervention, Product/Supply Support) with gradient styling when selected, plus Remarks textarea

Month_on_Month_Comparison.details: Table with 10 metrics across 3 months (Feb, Mar, Apr 2026). Revenue and Outstanding rows are editable with pencil icon, input fields, save/cancel buttons

Performance_KPIs_Section.details: 6 KPI cards (Achievement %, Pipeline Coverage, Outstanding Ratio, Visit Productivity, Call Productivity, Conversion Rate) with gradient styling and color-coded values

Save_Draft_Button.details: Clicking Save Draft saves record and changes status badge to 'Draft'

Submit_Button.details: Submit button visible and clickable (not tested to avoid changing production data)

Glass_Morphism_Styling.details: backdrop-blur-xl, bg-white/80, shadow-lg classes present on all cards

Gradient_Styling.details: Gradient top borders on cards (blue-indigo, emerald-teal, amber-orange, red-rose, violet-purple, indigo-blue, teal-cyan), gradient buttons, gradient summary tile backgrounds

Contrast_Accessibility.details: Dark sidebar with white text, light cards with dark text, gradient buttons with white text - all have good contrast
